subcodes.first_line: O tranquil leaf! In this divine Cycle and merciful Dispensation, human temples are freed from the bondage of male and female distinction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطمئنه در این کور الهی و دوره رحمانی هیاکل انسانی از قید ذکور و اناثی
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @role and station of women, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
